summary: All four requirements (REQ-23 through REQ-26) are substantially implemented. The backend main.mo adds the colorScheme Text field with a default of 'default', the TypeScript types and hooks are updated, the Admin SiteSettingsSection includes a Color Scheme subsection with 4+ predefined swatches and toast notifications, and App.tsx applies CSS variable overrides via data-color-scheme attribute on the document root. The index.css defines per-scheme overrides. No significant missing requirements were found, but one hallucinated feature was identified: a separate migration.mo file was created despite the constraint requiring all Motoko logic to remain in the single main actor file.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate backend/migration.mo module was created to handle data migration for the colorScheme field
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint explicitly states 'All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)', but a new separate Motoko file was introduced
